name: How soon after launching GEO content do AIs pick it up?

mainEntity.name: How soon after launching GEO content do AIs pick it up?

acceptedAnswer.description: **1-4 weeks for major AIs if fresh and authoritative; local faster.**[2] **Key factors:** 1. Crawl frequency. 2. Content quality. **Submit sitemap, promote shares; retest weekly.**[3] Patience required.[9]
